comment: Synthetic advanced/recurrent endometrial endometrioid carcinoma, dMMR (MLH1/PMS2 IHC loss), female 64. Plan target IND-ENDOMETRIAL-ADVANCED-1L-PEMBRO-CHEMO (NRG-GY018, pembro+carbo+pacli). Engine routes ALGO-ENDOMETRIAL-ADVANCED-1L → default IND-ENDOMETRIAL-ADVANCED-1L-PEMBRO-CHEMO (no drift; algorithm step-1 'dMMR / MSI-high tumor' is free-text without disease-scoped RF, so default applies and KN-775/NRG-GY018 supports pembro+chemo across MMR strata). Lynch-syndrome germline workup triggered by dMMR finding.
